case_title: LOUIE, KINRY C, PROPERTY MANAGER VS FABIANI, JOHNNY, DBA ALPHA ROOFING CO.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LOUIE, KINRY C, PROPERTY MANAGER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FABIANI, JOHNNY, DBA ALPHA ROOFING CO. $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,060.00, PLFT AGREES TO A 10 DAY GRACE PERIOD. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF JAN-30-1997, NO APPEARANCE, ORDER OF ARREST TO ISSUE, BAIL $500.00, AS TO DEFENDANT FABIANI, JOHNNY, DBA ALPHA ROOFING CO.
OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF DEC-19-1996, NO APPEARANCE, CONTINUED FOR LETTER FROM DEC-19-1996 TO JAN-30-1997 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT C AS TO DEFENDANT FABIANI, JOHNNY, DBA ALPHA ROOFING CO.
WARRANT OF ATTACHMENT RETURNED BY SHERIFF AS TO DEFENDANT FABIANI, JOHNNY, DBA ALPHA ROOFING CO.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT FABIANI, JOHNNY, DBA ALPHA ROOFING CO.

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT FABIANI, JOHNNY, DBA ALPHA ROOFING CO. HEARING SET FOR DEC-19-1996 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT C
ORDER OF EXAMINATION RETURNED SERVED, SERVICE DATE: NOV-19-1996 AS TO DEFENDANT FABIANI, JOHNNY, DBA ALPHA ROOFING CO.
WARRANT OF ATTACHMENT ISSUED, BAIL SET AT $500.00, AS TO DEFENDANT FABIANI, JOHNNY, DBA ALPHA ROOFING CO.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $147.25 ACCRUED INTEREST, $52.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT FABIANI, JOHNNY, DBA ALPHA ROOFING CO.
